description: Repo-side source of truth for branch protection / required status checks before a production-ready candidate can be declared.
notes: Release Readiness Summary already covers Runbook Validation (Dry Run Gate), Protocol Contract Drift Gate, Perf Baseline Regression Gate, and Rust Build and Test Gate.
Coverage no-regression gates are part of the conservative quality policy, but are not yet represented here as absolute release-candidate branch-protection requirements.
